function.name: get_function
function.description: Extract a specific function, method, class, or other code symbol from a file. Use list_only=true to see all available symbols without their content. Returns the exact code block with line numbers, perfect for targeted edits.

name.description: Name of the function/method/class to extract. Omit to list all symbols.

list_only.description: If true, only list symbol names and locations without content

commonErrors.solution: Symbol does not exist in file
